ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "curr_age" INTEGER /* Current age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (M/F) */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "age_phone" INTEGER /* Age at which the phone number was registered */,
  "purchase" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether a purchase was made (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer for communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer for delivery */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number for contact */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered on the platform */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity (e.g., purchase, login) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the customer account is active */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount spent on the purchase */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the items purchased */,
  "purchase_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_purchase_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_type_id") REFERENCES purchase_types ("purchase_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment (e.g., High Income, Millennial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristics of the segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the segment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the segment was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the segment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer segment targeted by the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was last updated */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience for the campaign */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Key performance indicators for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketer, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the platform */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string indicating the device and browser used */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group analyzed (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customers in the analysis */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the customers in this group */,
  "total_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by this group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was last updated */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Period over which the analysis was conducted (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer for whom the statistics are generated */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "purchase_count" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase made by the customer */,
  "average_spent" REAL /* Average amount spent per purchase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_statistics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_types" (
  "purchase_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the purchase type (e.g., Electronics, Furniture) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purchase type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the purchase type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the purchase type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the purchase type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase item */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase to which the item belongs */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the purchase item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item purchased */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the purchase */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_items_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchase_history ("purchase_id")
)
